'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 38''' was the thirty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[September 18]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Escape from [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] - [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader's]] Trap
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes]]
*[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]] - [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]
*[[GRZ-6B wrecker droid|GRZ-6B Wrecker Droid]]
*[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone Trooper]] Equipment
*[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] (AT-ST)
